untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'historical resistance level' and 'at least one prior test within last 30 bars' — these require multi-bar pattern recognition (swing high detection, resistance zone identification) not available in the allowed indicator set. The Pivot (r1) is used as a proxy for resistance, but true implementation requires lookback pattern analysis across 40 bars to identify dynamically-formed resistance zones, which exceeds the scope of single-bar technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted translation using pivot point r1 as a practical proxy for resistance level. Entry condition translates price crossing above resistance (r1) with volume confirmation above 20-bar historical average. Exit uses reversal below resistance. However, the core signal logic—identifying previously-defended resistance through multiple tests—cannot be fully expressed without custom pattern-matching logic or multi-bar state tracking.
